body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Add updated seabreeze animations showing convection to buildkite. This was first implemented in #540 but that has additional changes we don't want in main.

Closes #533

### Status 5 Jan 2024
Results are nondeterministic, probably because of random initial condition in atmosphere. I tried initializing the atmosphere with 0 everywhere instead, but that didn't produce any reasonable results.

### Status 3 March 2024
After setting the random seed, the results are reproducible and look good :)
title: update sea_breeze plots
